when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @because(think(experiencer=x1, quote=q{ @can(happen(undergoer=[q:some m:very.bad SOMETHING~THING !2], time=after@#NOW)) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement=x2) ; @maybe(happen(undergoer=x2, time=after@#NOW)) }), feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#BAD)) }
when-true refs[x1:someone] { live(undergoer=x1, time=#NOW) ; @can(move(undergoer=[BODY])) ; @can(feel(experiencer=x1)) }

when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:someone,x3:something] { @because(think(experiencer=x1, quote=q{ do(agent=[SOMEONE !2], undergoer=[q:some m:bad SOMETHING~THING !3], time=before@#NOW) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement=x3) ; want(experiencer=#I, complement={ do(agent=#I, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]) }) }), feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#BAD)) }

when-true refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:time] { @because(do(agent=[SOMEONE !2], undergoer=[SOMETHING~THING]), there-is(undergoer=x1)) ; think(experiencer=x2, quote=q{ see(experiencer=#I, stimulus=x1, time=before@#NOW) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement={ see(experiencer=#I, stimulus=x1, time=#NOW) }) ; @if(want(experiencer=#I, complement={ see(experiencer=#I, stimulus=x1, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3 | @after(#NOW, there-is(undergoer=x3))]) }), @can(see(experiencer=#I, stimulus=x1, time=x3))) }) }
relational refs[x1:something,x2:time] { @before(x2, @not(happen(undergoer=x1))) ; happen(undergoer=x1, time=x2) ; @after(x2, happen(undergoer=x1)) }
relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { think(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, quote=q{ true(undergoer=x2) }) ; @not(know(experiencer=x1, complement={ true(undergoer=x2) })) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:time] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:event>)]) ; happen(undergoer=x1, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3]) ; @before(x3, @not(live(undergoer=[SOMEONE !2]))) ; @after(x3, live(undergoer=x2)) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:something,x4:place] { @because(do(agent=[SOMEONE !2], undergoer=[SOMETHING~THING]), there-is(undergoer=x1)) ; there-is(undergoer=[d:other SOMETHING~THING !3]) ; be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[WORDS]) ; say(agent=x1, topic=x3) ; @because(there-is(undergoer=x1), @can(know(experiencer=x2, complement={ be-somewhere(undergoer=x3, locus=[d:some WHERE~PLACE !4]) }))) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:time] { do(agent=x1, undergoer=x2, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3]) ; @because(do(agent=x1, undergoer=x2), happen(undergoer=[q:some m:bad SOMETHING~THING], time=x3)) ; @after(x3, @not(be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[q:one SOMETHING~THING]))) ; @after(x3, there-is(undergoer=[q:many m:small SOMETHING~THING])) ; @after(x3, @not(@can(do(agent=[PEOPLE], undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING], instrument=x2)))) }

when-true refs[x1:something,x2:something] { @before(#NOW, happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:break>) !2])) ; @because(happen(undergoer=x2), @not(@can(do(agent=[PEOPLE], undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING], instrument=x1)))) }

relational refs[x1:something,x2:something,x3:time] { happen(undergoer=x1, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3]) ; @because(happen(undergoer=x1), happen(undergoer=x2, time=after@x3)) ; @if(@not(happen(undergoer=x1)), @not(happen(undergoer=x2))) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:something] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[m:big kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:event>)]) ; @because(happen(undergoer=[q:some m:very.good SOMETHING~THING !2], time=before@#NOW), happen(undergoer=x1)) ; @when(happen(undergoer=x1), be-spec(undergoer=[q:many PEOPLE], attribute=<urn:kernel-v0:happy>)) ; @when(happen(undergoer=x1), feel(experiencer=[q:many PEOPLE], attribute=#GOOD)) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:something,x3:time] { happen(undergoer=x1, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3]) ; @before(x3, be-spec(undergoer=[d:some SOMETHING~THING !2], attribute=[q:one kind-of([SOMETHING~THING])])) ; @after(x3, @not(be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[d:the-same kind-of([SOMETHING~THING])]))) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:someone] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[WORDS]) ; say(agent=[SOMEONE !2], addressee=[d:other SOMEONE !3 | be-spec(undergoer=x3, attribute=<urn:kernel-v0:grieving>)], topic=x1) ; @because(don't-want(experiencer=x2, complement={ feel(experiencer=x3, attribute=#BAD, duration=#A-LONG-TIME) }), say(agent=x2, addressee=x3, topic=x1)) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:someone] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:event>)]) ; @when(happen(undergoer=x1), say(agent=[SOMEONE !2], addressee=[d:other SOMEONE !3], topic=[q:many SOMETHING~THING])) ; @when(happen(undergoer=x1), say(agent=x3, addressee=x2, topic=[q:many SOMETHING~THING])) ; hear(experiencer=x2, stimulus=[q:many WORDS]) }
when-true refs[x1:someone] { die(undergoer=x1, time=before@#NOW) ; @not(live(undergoer=x1, time=#NOW)) ; @not(@can(do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]))) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:time] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:event>)]) ; happen(undergoer=x1, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3]) ; @when(happen(undergoer=x1), die(undergoer=[SOMEONE !2])) ; @after(x3, @not(live(undergoer=x2))) }

relational refs[x1:something,x2:time] { @before(x2, happen(undergoer=x1)) ; @after(x2, @not(happen(undergoer=x1))) ; @can(know(experiencer=[PEOPLE], complement={ happen(undergoer=x1, time=before@x2) })) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:time] { happen(undergoer=x1, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !2]) ; @after(x2, @not(happen(undergoer=x1))) ; @can(know(experiencer=[PEOPLE], complement={ happen(undergoer=x1, time=before@#NOW) })) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:place] { @before(#NOW, @not(know(experiencer=x1, complement={ be-somewhere(undergoer=x2, locus=[d:some WHERE~PLACE !3]) }))) ; @because(do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]), see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=x2, time=#NOW)) ; know(experiencer=x1, complement={ be-somewhere(undergoer=x2, locus=x3) }, time=#NOW) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=before@#NOW) ; @not(know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=#NOW)) ; @not(@can(think(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=#NOW))) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:someone] { know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2) ; think(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, quote=q{ @when(do(agent=#I, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING], comitative=x2), feel(experiencer=#I, attribute=#GOOD)) ; want(experiencer=#I, complement={ feel(experiencer=x2, attribute=#GOOD) }) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement={ feel(experiencer=x2, attribute=#BAD) }) }) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:something,x3:someone,x4:someone] { happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:give>) !2], time=before@#NOW) ; @because(happen(undergoer=x2), @can(say(agent=[SOMEONE !3], quote=q{ is-mine(undergoer=x1, possessor=#I) }))) ; want(experiencer=[d:other SOMEONE !4], complement={ feel(experiencer=x3, attribute=#GOOD) }) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:someone,x4:time] { do(agent=x1, undergoer=x2, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !4]) ; @before(x4, @can(say(agent=x1, quote=q{ is-mine(undergoer=x2, possessor=#I) }))) ; @after(x4, @can(say(agent=[d:other SOMEONE !3], quote=q{ is-mine(undergoer=x2, possessor=#I) }))) ; @after(x4, @not(@can(say(agent=x1, quote=q{ is-mine(undergoer=x2, possessor=#I) })))) }

when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @before(#NOW, happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:death>) !2])) ; @because(happen(undergoer=x2), be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=<urn:kernel-v0:sad>)) ; think(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, duration=#FOR-SOME-TIME) }

when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @because(think(experiencer=x1, quote=q{ happen(undergoer=[q:some m:good SOMETHING~THING !2], time=before@#NOW) ; want(experiencer=#I, complement=x2) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement=[d:other SOMETHING~THING], time=#NOW) }), feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#GOOD)) }
relational refs[x1:something,x2:something] { be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[part-of(x1)]) ; be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[q:one SOMETHING~THING]) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:someone,x3:something] { want(experiencer=x2, complement={ do(agent=x2, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING !3]) }) ; @because(do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]), @can(do(agent=x2, undergoer=x3))) }

when-true refs[x1:someone] { @because(do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:many SOMETHING~THING]), happen(undergoer=[q:many kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:help>)])) ; want(experiencer=x1, complement={ feel(experiencer=[d:other PEOPLE], attribute=#GOOD) }) }
relational refs[x1:something,x2:something] { be-somewhere(undergoer=x1, locus=x2, manner=#INSIDE) ; @if(move(undergoer=x2), move(undergoer=x1)) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:something] { be-spec(undergoer=[d:some SOMETHING~THING !2], attribute=[kind-of(x1)]) ; @not(@can(@not(be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[kind-of(x1)])))) ; @can(know(experiencer=[PEOPLE], complement={ be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[q:one SOMETHING~THING]) })) ; @can(know(experiencer=[PEOPLE], complement={ @not(be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[q:two SOMETHING~THING])) })) ; @can(know(experiencer=[PEOPLE], complement={ be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[d:the-same SOMETHING~THING | see(experiencer=[PEOPLE], stimulus=x2, time=before@#NOW)]) })) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @before(#NOW, @not(know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2))) ; @because(want(experiencer=x1, complement={ know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2) }), do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:many SOMETHING~THING])) ; know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=#NOW) }

instance refs[x1:someone] { say(agent=x1, topic=[q:many kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:lie>)]) ; @because(say(agent=x1, topic=[q:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:lie>)]), @can(think(experiencer=[d:other PEOPLE], topic=x1, quote=q{ be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[m:bad SOMEONE]) }))) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:someone] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[WORDS]) ; say(agent=[SOMEONE !2], addressee=[d:other SOMEONE !3], topic=x1) ; know(experiencer=x2, complement={ @not(true(undergoer=x1)) }) ; @because(want(experiencer=x2, complement={ think(experiencer=x3, quote=q{ true(undergoer=x1) }) }), say(agent=x2, addressee=x3, topic=x1)) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:place] { @before(#NOW, know(experiencer=x1, complement={ be-somewhere(undergoer=x2, locus=[d:some WHERE~PLACE !3]) })) ; @not(know(experiencer=x1, complement={ be-somewhere(undergoer=x2, locus=[d:some WHERE~PLACE]) }, time=#NOW)) ; want(experiencer=x1, complement={ know(experiencer=x1, complement={ be-somewhere(undergoer=x2, locus=x3) }) }) }

when-true refs[x1:something,x2:something,x3:someone] { @before(#NOW, happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:lose>) !2])) ; @not(know(experiencer=[SOMEONE !3], complement={ be-somewhere(undergoer=x1, locus=[d:some WHERE~PLACE]) }, time=#NOW)) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:time] { @because(do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING], time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3]), there-is(undergoer=x2)) ; @before(x3, @not(there-is(undergoer=x2))) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:something] { happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:make>) !3], time=before@#NOW) ; @when(happen(undergoer=x3), do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING])) ; @because(happen(undergoer=x3), there-is(undergoer=x2)) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:something] { be-somewhere(undergoer=x1, locus=[part-of([SOMEONE !2])]) ; there-is(undergoer=[d:other SOMETHING~THING !3]) ; @because(there-is(undergoer=x1), @can(think(experiencer=x2, topic=x3, time=#NOW))) ; @because(there-is(undergoer=x1), @can(happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:remember>)]))) }

relational refs[x1:something,x2:something,x3:someone] { be-somewhere(undergoer=x1, locus=x2, manner=#NEAR) ; @not(be-somewhere(undergoer=x1, locus=x2, manner=#FAR)) ; @if(be-somewhere(undergoer=[SOMEONE !3], locus=x2), @can(see(experiencer=x3, stimulus=x1))) }
relational refs[x1:something,x2:something] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[part-of(x2)]) ; @if(@not(there-is(undergoer=x1)), @not(be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[d:the-same SOMETHING~THING]))) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:someone,x4:something] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[WORDS]) ; say(agent=[SOMEONE !2], addressee=[d:other SOMEONE !3], topic=x1, quote=q{ @after(#NOW, do(agent=#I, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING !4])) ; know(experiencer=#I, complement={ want(experiencer=#YOU, complement=x4) }) ; @can(know(experiencer=#YOU, complement={ @after(#NOW, do(agent=#I, undergoer=x4)) })) }) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=before@#NOW) ; @because(know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=before@#NOW), @can(think(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=#NOW))) ; know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=#NOW) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:something] { @because(do(agent=[SOMEONE !2], undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]), there-is(undergoer=x1)) ; there-is(undergoer=[d:other SOMETHING~THING !3]) ; want(experiencer=x2, complement={ think(experiencer=x2, topic=x3, time=after@#NOW) }) ; @if(see(experiencer=x2, stimulus=x1), @can(happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:remember>)]))) ; @because(there-is(undergoer=x1), @not(happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:forget>)]))) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:time] { do(agent=x1, undergoer=x2, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3]) ; @before(x3, be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=<urn:kernel-v0:broken>)) ; @after(x3, @not(be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=<urn:kernel-v0:broken>))) ; @after(x3, @can(do(agent=[PEOPLE], undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING], instrument=x2))) }

when-true refs[x1:something] { think(experiencer=[PEOPLE], topic=x1, quote=q{ @if(do(agent=[SOMEONE], undergoer=x1), be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[m:good SOMETHING~THING])) }) ; @can(know(experiencer=[PEOPLE], complement={ be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[m:good SOMETHING~THING]) })) }

when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @because(think(experiencer=x1, quote=q{ happen(undergoer=[q:some m:bad SOMETHING~THING !2], time=before@#NOW) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement=x2) ; @not(@can(do(agent=#I, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]))) }), feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#BAD)) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:time] { do(agent=x1, undergoer=x2, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3]) ; @before(x3, @not(@can(say(agent=x1, quote=q{ is-mine(undergoer=x2, possessor=#I) })))) ; @after(x3, @can(say(agent=x1, quote=q{ is-mine(undergoer=x2, possessor=#I) }))) }

instance refs[x1:someone] { want(experiencer=x1, complement={ happen(undergoer=[q:many kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:learn>)]) }) ; @because(want(experiencer=x1, complement={ know(experiencer=[d:other PEOPLE], topic=[q:many SOMETHING~THING]) }), do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:many SOMETHING~THING])) ; say(agent=x1, addressee=[d:other PEOPLE], topic=[q:many SOMETHING~THING]) }

instance refs[x1:someone] { @because(do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:many SOMETHING~THING]), happen(undergoer=[q:many kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:take>)])) ; don't-want(experiencer=[d:other PEOPLE], complement={ happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:take>)]) }) ; don't-want(experiencer=x1, complement={ see(experiencer=[d:other PEOPLE], stimulus=x1) }) }

when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @if(say(agent=x1, topic=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:promise>) !2]), do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING], time=after@#NOW)) ; @not(say(agent=x1, topic=[q:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:lie>)])) ; @can(think(experiencer=[d:other PEOPLE], topic=x1, quote=q{ be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[m:good SOMEONE]) })) }

when-true refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:something] { @if(want(experiencer=[SOMEONE !2], complement={ do(agent=x2, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING !3]) }), @can(do(agent=x2, undergoer=x3, instrument=x1))) ; @because(there-is(undergoer=x1), @can(do(agent=x2, undergoer=[q:many m:more.good SOMETHING~THING]))) }

when-true refs[x1:something,x2:someone] { @if(want(experiencer=[SOMEONE !2], complement={ see(experiencer=x2, stimulus=x1) }), @can(see(experiencer=x2, stimulus=x1))) ; @can(see(experiencer=[PEOPLE], stimulus=x1)) }

when-true refs[x1:something,x2:something] { think(experiencer=[PEOPLE], topic=x1, quote=q{ @if(do(agent=[SOMEONE], undergoer=x1), happen(undergoer=[q:some m:bad SOMETHING~THING])) }) ; don't-want(experiencer=[PEOPLE], complement={ do(agent=[SOMEONE], undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING !2 | @like(x2, x1)]) }) }

a living thing of one kind; it can move, it can see, it can hear, it can feel; it is not someone: it cannot say words, it cannot think like people can think; there are many kinds of these living things; some live near people, some live far from people

a thing of one kind; people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make} things of this kind; it is not like other things: all its sides are the same; when someone does something to it with the {urn:molecule-v0:hand|hand} [m], it can move on the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m] for some time; {urn:molecule-v0:child|children} [m] do things with it at many times because it feels good
an {urn:molecule-v0:animal|animal} [m] of one kind; it is very big; it does not live with people, it lives far from people; if someone is very near one, something very bad can happen to this someone

an {urn:molecule-v0:animal|animal} [m] of one kind; many of them are small; it can move far above the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m], it can move in the {urn:molecule-v0:sky|sky} [m]; people can hear some of them at many times, this can feel good

one {urn:molecule-v0:color|color} [m]; when someone sees the {urn:molecule-v0:sky|sky} [m] when it is {urn:molecule-v0:day|day} [m], if there is nothing else in it, this someone sees it; when someone sees very much {urn:molecule-v0:water|water} [m] in one place, at many times this someone sees it

a thing of one kind; people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make} things of this kind; there are very many words inside it: people can see these words; when someone sees these words, this someone can know many things because of them; people want things of this kind because of this

a thing of one kind; people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make} things of this kind because of this: things can be inside it; someone can {urn:molecule-v0:open|open} [m] it, someone can {urn:molecule-v0:close|close} [m] it; after someone does this, people cannot see the things inside it

a thing of one kind; people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make} things of this kind; it is big: people can be inside it; it can move on the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m]; when people are inside it when it moves, they can be in another place, very far, after a short time

an {urn:molecule-v0:animal|animal} [m] of one kind; it is small; many of them live with people, in the places where people live; it moves like this: people cannot hear it when it moves; it can see when people cannot see

someone of one kind: someone of this kind was {urn:kernel-v0:birth|born} a short time before now; the body of someone of this kind is small; someone of this kind cannot do many things; after a long time, someone of this kind is big, can do many things

someone does something of one kind to a thing; it is not like {urn:molecule-v0:open|open} [m]: it is the other way; before this, things can move into this thing, out of it; after this, things cannot move into it, out of it

things of one kind; people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make} things of this kind; things of this kind can be on someone's body; people want them on the body: because of them, other people cannot see all of the body, the body does not feel {urn:molecule-v0:cold|cold} [m]

relational refs[x1:something,x2:something] { want(experiencer=x1, complement={ @can(@not(see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=#YOU))) }) ; think(experiencer=[d:other SOMEONE], topic=[q:some WHEN~TIME]) ; @more(#SMALL) }

instance refs[x1:someone] { @can(@maybe(want(experiencer=x1, complement={ see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=#YOU) }))) ; @because(@because(think(experiencer=x1, time=#NOW), think(experiencer=#I, topic=x1, time=#NOW)), live(undergoer=[q:one WHERE~PLACE])) ; @when(don't-want(experiencer=[BODY], complement=[q:few m:good x1]), know(experiencer=x1, complement={ think(experiencer=x1, duration=#A-SHORT-TIME) }, place=[d:the-same m:good WHERE~PLACE])) ; be-spec(undergoer=[q:all m:good PEOPLE], attribute=[MOMENT | happen(undergoer=x1)], duration=#A-SHORT-TIME) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:place,x3:something] { want(experiencer=x1, complement={ want(experiencer=x1, complement={ want(experiencer=x1, complement={ see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=#YOU) }) }) }) ; hear(experiencer=x1, stimulus=[x1], duration=#A-SHORT-TIME) ; be-spec(undergoer=[x1 | feel(experiencer=#I, duration=#A-SHORT-TIME)], attribute=[d:other SOMETHING~THING], time=#NOW) ; live(undergoer=[d:other SIDE !2 | hear(experiencer=x2, stimulus=x2)]) ; know(experiencer=x1, topic=[WHERE~PLACE], time=before@#NOW, place=[d:other x2]) ; die(undergoer=[d:this m:small SOMETHING~THING !3]) }
relational refs[x1:someone,x2:someone] { @not(know(experiencer=x1, complement={ know(experiencer=x1, complement={ know(experiencer=x1, complement={ live(undergoer=x1) }) }) })) }

instance refs[x1:someone] { know(experiencer=x1, complement={ want(experiencer=x1, complement={ want(experiencer=x1, complement={ @maybe(do(agent=x1, undergoer=#I)) }) }) }) ; @if(live(undergoer=x1, place=#HERE), move(undergoer=x1)) }

instance refs[x1:something] { want(experiencer=x1, complement={ want(experiencer=x1, complement={ know(experiencer=x1, complement={ know(experiencer=x1, complement={ do(agent=x1, undergoer=#I) }) }) }) }) ; @not(think(experiencer=x1, topic=[WORDS], manner=#LIKE~AS~WAY)) ; say(agent=x1, addressee=x1, topic=x1, manner=#LIKE~AS~WAY) }
